Pode tirar. [música] Todas as minhas dores sumiram. E eu [música] me sinto mais nova. O meu cabelo está começando a ficar branco. videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição I spent the night at my girlfriend's house without her knowing. After so much insistence, Morgana finally got what she wanted. Guys, he agreed! But this caused a lot of frustration for Nicolas, who is totally in love with Morgana's sister. Eynaldinho, I need to talk to you, dude! Are you going to break the door like that, Nicolas? Weird. I'm not sure why you're acting so mean. The door is open. Oh wow, finally, Eynaldinho! Finally! I want to tell you something, I'm really sad today. Okay, man, go ahead. What happened? Ah, dude, I was thinking about Flor today, I spent the whole day thinking about her and realized I'll never work out with her, Eynaldinho. Glad you figured it out, now you can stop bothering me and her about it. No, Eynaldo, but it's because I was thinking. You've dated twice already, you dated before and now Morgana, and I was thinking about that. And? And maybe if I really knew her, her daily life, what she does, what she likes, I might have a chance. What do you think? Oh, Nicolas, I don't know, man. You always come to my house wanting to talk about this as if I had something to do with it. Sometimes I backed off and you insist on hitting on her. Honestly, dude, I have no idea how I can help you know more about Flor like you want, okay? It's obvious you can, Eynaldinho, you're dating her sister. But look, in my defense, I'm not dating Morgana because I want to, I started dating her because I was put in a pressure situation. Plus, I have to think of a way to get out of this mess I got into too, man, because being Morgana's boyfriend will be impossible. Okay, okay, Eynaldinho, if you want to break up with Morgana, do it later, okay? First you're going to help me with Flor. B-B-But then I'm going to date Morgana against my will because of you? Aren't you my friend? Nicolas has helped me lots of times so. Okay, tell me what you thought. Look, Eynaldinho, I have a plan, something you might be able to help with, and we have to be very careful. I thought we could spend the night at her house without her seeing. What? That's exactly what you heard. If we can spend the night at Morgana and Flor's house, I'll be able to learn what she likes, what she likes to do in her daily life, and then I'll have a chance. Nicolas, are you going nuts? How are we going to spend the night at Morgana's house without her knowing? That's crazy! Come on, Eynaldinho, what's so crazy about it? I was checking here, we've already spent the night at several YouTubers' houses, Emily Wick's, Nathan's. Just one more, it won't be that hard. Yeah, thinking about it, you're right. Okay, the first thing we need to know is Morgana's address? Oh, I, I, I, I, I don't know! How come you don't know your own girlfriend's address? First thing, Nicolas, she wasn't supposed to become my girlfriend and second, I've never been there, our relationship is new. Ah Eynaldinho, I only called you for this plan because I thought you had her address. Okay, but that's easy to solve, I'll call her and ask, simple. No, don't ask, that's very suspicious, she'll expect you to show up if you ask that. Okay, okay, makes sense. Yeah, but I can call her and try to find out the address with clues, without directly asking where she lives. Yeah, I think it's kind of hard, but if it's our only try, go ahead. Hello? H-H-Hello? Hey, Morgana? It's Eynaldinho. Hi, Eynaldinho. How are you? Why are you calling me? So, actually, I wanted to know. What's the distance from your house to that ice cream shop you like the most? Yeah. I don't know, about 10 minutes? 10 minutes from Morgana's house. Why the question? Okay, okay, okay, okay. And from your house to my house, how long roughly? Is it sort of along the way from the ice cream shop? About 15? And if you think about the distance from your house to the BH airport, do you have an idea of how far it is? Oh, I don't know, Eynaldinho, about 30 minutes? And you don't want to know about me? You're only talking about my house? No, but but. Do you want to visit my house? No, no, no, I don't want to visit your house, not today, not this week, n-no, I don't want to, okay? It's too bad I'm really busy today, it wouldn't work, but you could come over someday, okay? Okay, okay, alright. Well, anyway, I need to hang up now Morgana, bye, it was nice talking to you. Bye, bye! Already? Man, it's hard to keep asking these questions, she'll get suspicious eventually. I tried to gather as much info as possible from Morgana and still couldn't get her address. What? You called her but didn't ask anything? What did you ask then? Look, I found out the distance from her house to her favorite ice cream shop, the distance from her house to my house, the distance from her house to the airport. We just need to find the direction to those places to pinpoint a location. Ah Eynaldinho, you're kidding me, it's obvious we won't find her house like this! Okay, but she was already asking if I wanted to visit her house. If I really wanted her address, all I’d have to do is ask and she’d just tell me. But for sure, she’d start getting suspicious. Yeah, you're right, but hold on, I have a better idea. Hey guys, here's the thing, I remembered that Eynaldinho recently got a gift by mistake from Flor and they live together. And I know there was a big clean up here the other day, and Eynaldinho threw out the box that gift came in, and I bet the address is still on it. Nothing in this trash can, but maybe there’s something outside. I wasn't going crazy. Ha! It's here. Mushroom Albuquerque Street 8788? What a strange address. I got her address! Okay, but are you sure you really want to go through with this plan? Of course, it's for me and Flor, please dude. Alright, man, let's go then. Eynaldinho, are we getting there? Man, I put the address you gave me and I'm following the GPS! Ah, but it's taking too long, dude! The worst part is I'm looking around to see if I find any clues, any suspicious house, but nothing so far. Apparently, this is Morgana's address. Wow, are we at the right place? There's nothing here. Do you see that right at the gate there's like a path of flowers? Eynaldinho, Flower loves to play with flowers! So that's it! This is definitely Morgana's house. Alright, let's get closer to see if we can confirm it. I'm starting to think Nicolas is actually right. Why would there be so many petals on the street, forming a sort of path? That's really weird. I told you, Flor has some really strange habits. It makes her easy to find. Okay, but if this really is Morgana's house, we need to figure out how to get in without being seen. What the heck, Flor? Look at this mess! Did you forget I live here too? I love playing around with my flowers! Dude, you were right. This really is their house. You need to understand, Flower, that you can't just throw your stuff all over the floor. Morgana, you know what? I've had enough! Get away from me! That's why you can't keep throwing these colorful flowers everywhere, Flower. Oh, Morgana, I just want to make the house happier, more colorful. You guys and Dad are so depressing! Not depressing. You're the one without style, without culture. Oh Morgana, that's why I want to leave this house. I can't stand you and your nagging anymore! Listen, Flower, you need to respect me because I'm your older sister. Come here. Hey, Morgana! Hands off my bouquet! Quit being such a pest! Cut it out, girls! Wow, Dad, look at the big mess she made here! Dad, I didn't do anything wrong. I just wanted to make the house more colorful. Morgana's always teasing me! I don't want to hear anything else. You both clean this up. You're grounded because I have to go. I'm hitting the road for my motorcycle meet, no more buts. Oh man! Oh man, Nicolas, we better get out of here. Quick! I want this place spotless, got it? Whoa, Nicolas. That was a close one. Wait, where are the girls? See, Flower? I told you that you shouldn't have made that mess. I was nice and helped you clean up. Now the rest is your mess. I'm not cleaning anything. You're the ones who complained about my flowers. Dad said you have to. You have to clean it up. No, he told us both to clean. Well, I helped you. You're the one who made the mess. I don't have to clean up your mess. You know what? I'm going to my room. Ugh, that girl, argh. Enaldinho, I'm looking around, but I don't see them. This is really our chance. Let's take advantage because her dad told her to clean up those flowers, so they have to come back here at any moment. Let's go through the garden so we're less suspicious, come on. Enaldinho, I think the coast is clear. I'm going to try to sneak in here. We know the girls are in the house, right? Go, be careful. Look, it seems like the light in that room is on. One of the girls might be up there. Hey Enaldinho, this looks like the living room and it's all dark. They must be further inside. Let me check if the next room down the hall is clear too. It's the kitchen, the best part of the house. Wait, dude, the light is on. If it's on, someone might have just come in. Wait, wait, wait, hey, hey, come here, come here! What is it? When you left, I could see a room that looked all pink. It could be one of the girls' rooms. Most likely, it must be Flower's, right? So don't walk around like that without knowing where they are. Look, that one really looks like a pink room. Hmm, hmm, Nicolas, what are you doing, dude? You're not at home, you're at Morgana's house, remember? It's very likely this is yours and she brought it here, right? It looks like this is really the bedroom area, so we need to try to get through here without making too much noise. Oh Luli, but sometimes I feel so out of place, you know? Do you think Dad and Morgana don't like me? What do I have that's so different from them? Wow, guys, this is really Flower's room. Now the thing is, how are we going to get past here without her seeing us, Nicolas? Oh, I’ve got an idea! Wait, wait, are you serious? Your turn, come on, let’s go! I'll go, but I'll do a somersault. Yeah, Luli, maybe we're just different, right? Which isn't a problem. Maybe being different isn't so bad. Look, Enaldinho, Flower is really sad, we need to talk to her. Of course not, dude, or she'll find out we're here. Let's stick to the plan you suggested, please. Take it easy. She drives me crazy sometimes. She doesn't get it, she can't keep challenging Dad like that, she's going to get us both in trouble. Ugh, she doesn't understand that I just want what's best for her. Whoa, dude, this seems to be Morgana's room, and she seems pretty upset. She might pop out of her room any minute now, Nick. Enaldão, Enaldão, there’s a room right next door, let’s go in there! Close the door, close the door. Dude, what room is this? It's all dark, I can't see a thing. Nicolas, is it just me or did you lead us straight into the room of. Hades? Wow, dude, I already thought it was crazy that we're breaking into Morgana's house. But sneaking into her dad's room is insane, dude. We better get out of here as fast as we can. Without making a sound, go. The Flower should still be in her room. I think I'm gonna grab something to eat. I'm super hungry. That was close. It's your fault, your fault! Why did you come through here? But look on the bright side, apparently Flower was hungry, it's the perfect time for you to find out more about her. Nice, Enaldinho! In fact, I'm going to use my notebook. Uncle Nick's secret notebook? Yes, this is where I write down all the information I need to win over Flower. She went for a snack at 6:39 PM. Yeah, in the afternoon. Done. Oh, alright. Anyway, let's go see what she's eating in the kitchen. Let me take a look. She's there. I don't think there's anything I like. I know! There's the drawer. Yay, my pink treats! This here is the best snack in the world. Wow, dude. Did you see that, Nicolas? Let me check where she is. Looks like she's going to eat in the living room. Eating in the living room. Are you noticing this? Of course. It's the perfect time for us to sneak into her room, now that she's all by herself. We don't have much time. We can only stay here for one minute while she's eating, got it? Look, everything is pink. What's this? Yeah, I guess it matches her personality a bit. There's a Barbie here, an Enaldinho doll, and lots of flowers that suit her name. The mattress is pink, the pillow is pink, and her phone. Her phone? It's pink too. Let me see if there's any message. You guys aren't even a couple yet, that's totally snooping! Leave her be. Oh, sneaking into her house and room is no big deal, huh?! I'm doing this for you, dude. Because of me? Of course, Nicolas. I'm only doing this crazy thing for you. Strange. Oh, where's my cell phone? There's no message from Rafael. How strange. Who's Rafael? Wow, Nicolas, we almost got caught. Are you really worried about the message she got on her phone? Of course, I'm only doing this because I have a huge crush on her and she already has another guy. Look, Nicolas, I know it's not easy to have unrequited love. But think on the bright side, she said this guy didn't reply, so maybe he's not even interested in her yet. Oh, you're right, I'll write everything down so I can know everything later. Let's stick to the plan. The house is super quiet, so we need to know exactly where the girls are so we don't get caught at any doors. She needs to understand that I just want what's best for her.
